narrative:
Township Richland township has 3,928 registered voters, with 45.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
